    Method
    Description

    RestaurantModel.getBasket()
    Return basket

    RestaurantController.getCurrBasket()

    Returns model's oven
    ArrayList<Toppings>
    RestaurantModel.getDaysIngredients()
    Return daysIngredients
    ArrayList<Toppings>
    RestaurantController.getDaysToppings()
    Returns day's toppings using getDaysIngredients() on model
    ArrayList<Toppings>
    KnownCustomer.getFavoriteOrder()
    Returns this customer's favorite order.
    ArrayList<Toppings>
    Customer.getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings> ingredientsList, int maxPick)
    creates the customer's order based on a list of available ingredients and the maximum number of items the customer is allowed to pick.
    ArrayList<Toppings>
    David.getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings> ingredientsList, int maxPick)
    Returns David's full order, which consists of a preset of favorite order and a repeated instances of favorite topping until the maximum number picks.
    ArrayList<Toppings>
    GenericCustomer.getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings> ingredientsList, int maxPick)
    Generates a random order for the customer by selecting random toppings from the available ingredient list until maxPick.
    ArrayList<Toppings>
    John.getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings> ingredientsList, int maxPick)
    Returns John's full order, which consists of a preset of favorite order and a repeated instances of favorite topping until the maximum number picks.
    ArrayList<Toppings>
    Mariah.getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings> ingredientsList, int maxPick)
    Returns Mariah's full order, which consists of a preset of favorite order and a repeated instances of favorite topping until the maximum number picks.
    ArrayList<Toppings>
    Peter.getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings> ingredientsList, int maxPick)
    Returns Peter's full order, which consists of a preset of favorite order and a repeated instances of favorite topping until the maximum number picks.
    ArrayList<Toppings>
    Sarah.getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings> ingredientsList, int maxPick)
    Returns Sarah's full order, which consists of a preset of favorite order and a repeated instances of favorite topping until the maximum number picks.
    Oven<Toppings>
    RestaurantModel.getOven()
    Return oven
    ArrayList<Toppings>
    Burger.getToppings()
    Returns a list containing all toppings in the burger in the order they were stacked.

    Ticket.getToppingsList()
    Returns the list of toppings included in this ticket.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    RestaurantController.addToBasket(Toppings topping)
    Adds a Topping to the player's basket
    void
    RestaurantModel.addToBasket(Toppings topping)
    Adds topping to basket.
    void
    RestaurantController.addToBurger(Toppings topping)
    Adds a Topping to the burger order
    void
    RestaurantModel.addToBurger(Toppings topping)
    Adds topping to burger via addTopping().
    void
    RestaurantController.addToOven(Toppings topping)
    Adds topping to oven in model using addToOven()
    void
    RestaurantModel.addToOven(Toppings topping)
    Adds topping, which must be a Patty, to the oven.
    void
    Burger.addTopping(Toppings topping)
    Adds a topping onto the burger.
    void
    Ticket.addTopping(Toppings newIngredient)
    Adds a new topping to the ticket's ingredients list.
    boolean
    Toppings.isTheSameIngredient(Toppings obj)
    Determines whether another topping represents the same ingredient.
    void
    Basket.remove(Toppings topping)
    Removes the specified ingredient from the basket.
    Toppings
    Oven.remove(Toppings topping)
    Removes a specific ingredient from the oven if it exists.
    void
    RestaurantController.removeFromBasket(Toppings topping)
    Removes topping from model using removeFromBasket()
    void
    RestaurantModel.removeFromBasket(Toppings topping)
    Removes topping from basket.
    void
    RestaurantController.removeFromOven(Toppings topping)
    Removes topping from oven in model using removeFromOven()
    void
    RestaurantModel.removeFromOven(Toppings topping)
    Removes Topping, which is a Patty, from oven, stops cooking it, and adds it to basket.

    Method
    Description

    RestaurantModel.getPrice(ArrayList<Toppings> toppings)
    Gets price for list of toppings.
    boolean
    RestaurantModel.isTheSameOrder(ArrayList<Toppings> ticketIngredients, ArrayList<Toppings> orderIngredients)
    Returns true if ticketIngredients is the same as orderIngredients, false otherwise.
    int
    RestaurantModel.pattyAccuracy(ArrayList<Toppings> served)
    Returns score for patties in a burger based on how well they were cooked.
